The '''"Defender" deflector shield generator''', also known as the '''"Defender" Deflector Screen Projector''', and '''"Defender" line projector''', was a model of [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] manufactured by [[Chempat Engineered Defenses]]. The system was used by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] in their [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]]. Projectors were positioned along the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter's]] [[S-foils/Legends|wings]] and tail for full coverage. It was capable of generating both [[Deflector shield/Legends|ray]] and [[Deflector shield/Legends|particle shields]].<ref name="SWS" />

{{Tech-stub}}
